title: Oil slumps amid fears of further OPEC supply hikes
section_path: Oil slumps amid fears of further OPEC supply hikes
section_path_text: Oil slumps amid fears of further OPEC supply hikes
summary:
Main
Weak economic data in China weighed on sentiment across the commodity complex. Prospects of another OPEC supply surge also pushed oil prices lower. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-05-01 103157.png | assets/2025-05-01_oil-slumps-amid-fears-of-further-opec-supply-hikes_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d5bf5f4e4bca.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices slumped further amid concerns of further OPEC supply hikes.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Weak economic data in China weighed on sentiment across the commodity complex. Prospects of another OPEC supply surge also pushed oil prices lower.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices slumped further amid concerns of further OPEC supply hikes. A Reuters report said that Saudi Arabian officials have been telling allies and industry experts that the Kingdom can endure sustained period of depressed prices.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
Shipping rates are starting to fall sharply as US tariffs start to bite. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-05-01 103226.png | assets/2025-05-01_oil-slumps-amid-fears-of-further-opec-supply-hikes_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_0b2ff32abcd0.png
